class.name: ResonanceRuntime
class.brief_description: Scene configuration node for Nexus Resonance. Initializes and drives the audio engine.
class.description: Nexus Resonance scene configuration node. Add via Add Child Node > ResonanceRuntime. Assign a ResonanceRuntimeConfig resource (create or link existing) for runtime settings. Handles ResonanceServer init, listener fallback when no ResonanceListener, reverb bus activator, pathing/reflection debug visualization, and notifying probe volumes when config changes.

method.name: get_config_dict
method.description: Returns config dict for init_audio_engine. Merges runtime config resource with debug_occlusion (player/source ray overlay state).

members.member: Runtime configuration resource. Create or link an existing .tres. Auto-created default if empty.
When false, debug/performance/player overlay toggle keys do nothing (for release builds). When turned off at runtime, open overlays and player ray viz are closed.
Key to toggle debug overlay at runtime (default: F1).
Key to toggle performance overlay at runtime (default: F2). Hidden until toggled on.
Key to toggle player/source ray visualization (occlusion + reflection rays; default: F3). Only processed when enable_debug is true.
